extension.description: VavooTV ist ein Video-Addon für Kodi. VavooTV dient als Auflistung für Filme und Serien Streams auf verschiedenen Hostern und Sprachen.
VavooTV is a video add-on for Kodi. VavooTV serves as a directory for streaming movies and TV series from various hosts and in different languages.
extension.disclaimer: [B][COLOR red]Die von diesem Addon dargestellten Inhalte werden von den Erstellern der Software weder gehostet oder verbreitet, noch stehen die Ersteller in irgendeiner Beziehung zu den Content-Anbietern![/COLOR][/B]
[B][COLOR red]The content displayed by this add-on is neither hosted nor distributed by the software creators, nor are the creators in any relationship with the content providers.[/COLOR][/B]
extension.license: GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE Version 3, 29 June 2007
extension.news:
Version 5.0 - Added Hard Cache Clean Option in settings - Added Addon Informations - Changed Auth-Method for Lokke issues - Changed Signature-Method to Android - Added Changelog in Addon - Changed Addon to GNU L3
Version 4.9 - Fixed Auth Errors
Version 4.8 - export M3U fix
Version 4.7 - Path handling Fix for import/export favorites
Version 4.6 - Added Import/Export Favorites (long press on Favorites)
Version 4.5 - Added Make M3U from your Favorites (Long press on TV Favorites) - Added Move Favorite to top or bottom
Version 4.4 - Added make M3U file locale for specific Country To create the M3U file, long-press on a country and select “Create M3U”. The file manager will open and ask you where to save the file (example: VavooTV-Germany-2026-02-16.m3u). * The function was adapted from michaz’s version. - Fixed an issue where tapping the favorites placeholder opened the settings.
EPG Service: 1. Use one of these services www.free-epg.de 2. Select your country. 3. Copy the EPG link. 4. Paste the link into your PVR client.
Version 4.3 - Created simple Main Menu
Version 4.2 - Favorite System changed/fixed
Version 4.1 - Added Options for Favorites
Version 3.9 - DebugLog prefix changed to ###VAVOO-TV### - Debug Logging fix - Code cleanup - AuthSig Time changed to 1h instead of 10min
Version 3.7 - changed token - changed signature - changed headers - changed session handle
Version 3.6 - rework of tokenheaders
Version 3.5 - Auth Errors fixed
Version 3.4: Fork release of vavoo by michaz & kasi - rework base code - clean up code
